name: Convex for Open Source
description: Convex sponsors open-source developers building tools, frameworks, and apps that strengthen the ecosystem with free Pro credits, swag, and direct community support.

perks.title: Free Convex Pro
perks.description: Free Convex Pro plan for one team with built-in monthly Pro resource limits.

perks.title: Convex Swag
perks.description: Stickers, shirts, and gear to rep your stack.

perks.title: Community Support
perks.description: Direct access to the Convex team and developer community when you need help.

eligibility: Must be an actively maintained and fully open-source project.
Must be built with Convex or planning to integrate Convex.
Must support the developer ecosystem through tools, libraries, or resources.
applicationProcess: Apply through the Convex OSS program page.
Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis with responses within 60 days.
